APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAFAYETTE ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA GEORGIOU JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
